Philly's HVAC Experts

Keeping Philadelphia comfortable, one home at a time. Trusted HVAC solutions for every season.

Call Now: +16108425443

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Decades of Comfort in the City of Brotherly Love

Tri-State Heating & Air Conditioning was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable HVAC services to our neighbors in Philadelphia. We understand the unique challenges our city presents, from the aging rowhomes in South Philly to the modern condos downtown.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hvac contractor services.

How quickly can you respond to an AC repair call?

We offer emergency AC repair services and strive to respond to all calls as quickly as possible, especially during peak season. Our goal is to get your system back up and running the same day.

What are some signs that my AC needs repair?

Common signs include warm air blowing from the vents, strange noises, leaks, and a sudden increase in your energy bills. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to call us for a professional inspection.

Do you offer a warranty on your AC repairs?

Yes, we stand behind our work and offer a warranty on all AC repairs. The specific warranty terms will vary depending on the type of repair and the parts used.

Reviews From Our HVAC Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Our AC went out during a heatwave, and Tri-State Heating & Air Conditioning came to the rescue! They were prompt, professional, and fixed the problem quickly. The technician, Dave, explained everything clearly and was very courteous. Highly recommend!"

Michael S. AC Repair

"We recently replaced our old furnace with a new high-efficiency model from Tri-State Heating & Air Conditioning. The installation process was smooth and efficient, and the team was very knowledgeable. Our house is noticeably warmer, and we're already seeing savings on our energy bills."

Jessica S. Furnace Installation

"I had my ducts cleaned by Tri-State Heating & Air Conditioning, and I'm very happy with the results. The air in my house feels cleaner, and my allergies have improved. The technician was thorough and professional."

Robert S. Duct Cleaning
